World.title: Middle East Conflict Escalates
World.description: Tensions between Iran and Israel intensify, affecting global energy routes and prompting international diplomatic action.

World.title: Gulf Airspace Disruptions Affect Flights
World.description: Commercial flights face delays and reroutes due to restricted airspace over the Gulf region.

US Politics.title: Supreme Court Adjourns Climate Activist Hearing
US Politics.description: Hearing on detention of climate activist Sonam Wangchuk is adjourned amid growing legal debate.

US Politics.title: Election Commission Schedules Assembly Poll Planning
US Politics.description: Preparations begin to finalize dates for upcoming Assembly elections in India.

Europe Economy.title: European Markets Show Volatility Due to Geopolitical Tension
Europe Economy.description: Major European indices react to uncertainty in West Asia, impacting investor confidence.

Asia Trade.title: Airlines Launch Special Flights Amid Gulf Disruptions
Asia Trade.description: Air India and IndiGo announce additional routes to bypass restricted airspace.

Asia Trade.title: Investment Rules Eased With Neighboring Countries
Asia Trade.description: India’s Union Cabinet eases investment regulations with neighboring states for economic growth.

Africa.title: African Governments Adjust Energy Policy
Africa.description: Nigeria and other nations adapt domestic energy planning in response to global disruptions.

Business.title: Global Markets React to Geopolitical Tensions
Business.description: Oil price swings lead to shifts in stocks, gold, and investor behavior worldwide.

Business.title: Investor Positioning Shifts in Indian Markets
Business.description: Foreign investors adjust portfolios amid uncertainty, domestic buyers step in.

Technology.title: Tech Giants Pledge AI Infrastructure Investment
Technology.description: Major tech firms commit to new power and tech infrastructure for AI advancements.

Technology.title: OpenAI Launches GPT‑5.4
Technology.description: The latest model improves capabilities for professional and enterprise applications.

Sports.title: IPL 2026 Schedule Announced
Sports.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru to face Sunrisers Hyderabad in the season opener on 28 March.

Sports.title: Asian Weightlifting Champs Postponed
Sports.description: Regional tensions lead to postponement of scheduled weightlifting competition.

Election.title: Assembly Election Dates Finalization Underway
Election.description: Election Commission holds meetings to set schedules for upcoming state elections.
